input: user-item interaction sequences (bipartite graph with temporal information)
output: ranked list of next items to recommend
backbone: position-enhanced and time-aware graph convolutional network (PTGCN)
key_idea: model sequential patterns and temporal dynamics via position-enhanced and time-aware graph convolution with self-attention aggregator
datasets: three real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
metrics: two commonly-used evaluation metrics for ranking (not specified in abstract)
